reAuditSummary: 2026-05-19 re-audit found that acceptance commands alone cannot prove V4 completion. Three focused gaps were patched first: FileWrite/FileEdit now surface post-mutation verification state to model-visible tool results; ToolProtocolIntegration is explicitly bounded as a disabled-by-default owner evidence harness and the missing legacy callId crash was fixed; query-loop final results now carry the long-task progress ledger and projection so final reports/API consumers can see the same ledger evidence. Launch-acceptance follow-up then closed 8/8 blockers: default visible tool hard cap, prompt/cache break ledger governance, unified edit lifecycle coverage for FileWrite/FileEdit/Notebook/Bash simulated sed write paths, GearBox verification recovery folded into the RECOVERY_DECISION_TABLE, Agent Evidence Envelope parent final gate acceptance, frozen experimental capability enforcement, focused real PTY trust UI resize/dialog regression, and the 20+ real task hit-rate/cost/cache raw pack.

closedItems.name: tool-window-hard-cap
evidence: src/dsxu/engine/query-loop.ts emits tool_subset_selected.visibleToolHardCap and ledger owner Tool Window / Query Loop
src/dsxu/engine/__tests__/engine.test.ts enforces default visible tool hard cap

closedItems.name: prompt-cache-governance
evidence: cache break events now append cost-cache ledger evidence with claim boundary
prompt-prefix/cache focused tests remain PASS

closedItems.name: unified-edit-lifecycle
evidence: FileWriteTool/FileEditTool already emit post-mutation verification envelopes and model-visible verification state
NotebookEditTool now emits the same post-mutation verification summary after notebook writes
BashTool simulated sed writes now emit the same post-mutation verification summary instead of bypassing the write lifecycle
src/dsxu/engine/__tests__/v4-edit-lifecycle.test.ts exercises real notebook and simulated sed file writes

Recovery decisions carry sourceRecoveryDecisionTable=true plus the dsxu.stall-recovery-decision.v1 envelope
progress-ledger RECOVERY_DECISION_TABLE remains the single default table for stall/failure recovery projection

Agent parent final gate replay blocks fake Done/PASS and allows evidence-cited or honest partial finals
query-loop and prompt governance focused tests block uncited or partial Agent evidence from becoming parent PASS

closedItems.name: freeze-experimental-capabilities

evidence: V4 freeze register marks voting, forked branch, swarm/team mesh, legacy ToolBus, multiple recovery planners, prompt stacks, standalone MCP/Skill runtime, background cache warmer, internal smoke-as-public-benchmark, and generic package entrypoint expansion as frozen/default-disabled/release-gated/owner-review-only
Agent orchestration mode tests normalize swarm/debate/remote/fork/sendmessage requests to serial_worker or parallel_fanout with parent evidence gates
Tool Protocol consistency tests prove the protocol remains disabled by default and explicit use is only an owner evidence harness, not a second product ToolBus

closedItems.name: 20-plus-real-task-hit-rate-cost-cache-raw-pack
evidence: docs/generated/DSXU_V4_REAL_TASK_HIT_RATE_PACK_20260519.json aggregates 24 real DSXU stream-json task traces from hard-engineering and raw-api-vs-dsxu reports
pack reports finalPassRatePct=95.8, secondAttemptRecoveryRatePct=95.8, observed cacheHitRatePct=64.9, totalCostUsd=0.176034, toolResultChars=163134, proAdmissionCount=0
claimBoundary keeps the pack internal V4 launch evidence only and blocks external leaderboard, target-reference comparison, and 90/95 public claims

claimBoundary: Owner-folded V4 consolidation evidence. This is not a public benchmark score, not a 90/95 claim, and not a replacement for final release gates.
releaseClaimBoundary: V4 P0-P8 consolidation can support GitHub engineering claims about owner-folded mainline architecture, six-stage release gates, clean export artifact, and fresh-install smoke. Public benchmark, external comparison, or 90/95 capability claims still require paired raw evidence, score protocol, cost, cache, and failure-recovery proof.

stages.owner: V4 Product Core Guard / Command Catalog
stages.summary: Feature owner map, freeze register, complexity risk register, and script surface map generated without adding generic product entrypoints.
DeepSeek chat/tool/thinking request construction folded into DeepSeekAdapter canonical body builder and APIService DeepSeek path.
StablePrefixLock, ToolSchemaFreeze, and CacheEpoch added to cache planning and evidence without background provider warmup.
stages.liveProviderBoundary: didCallProvider=false in this stage; live provider cache data remains a later P8/public-comparable raw evidence input.

stages.summary: Post-mutation verification final claim policy now distinguishes READY, NEEDS_FOCUSED_VERIFICATION, NEEDS_REVIEW, and BLOCKED. Re-audit patched the model-visible tool result path so success text also carries finalClaimAllowed/reviewRequired/rollback state.

ToolCallResult is the canonical post-boundary contract; provider/MCP/legacy tool shapes normalize only at Tool Gate boundary. Re-audit fixed the legacy wrapper fallback callId and added EngineHarness status evidence that Tool Protocol remains disabled by default and is not a second product ToolBus.

Failure taxonomy, verification failure, stall signals, and recovery actions now project into one recovery decision table and progress ledger path. Re-audit patched query-loop final result metadata so the same progress ledger and long-task projection reach final report/API consumers.

stages.owner: Agent Evidence / MCP Skill boundary owner
stages.summary: Agent handoff validates worker evidence envelope, parent citations, owned scope, output artifacts, and transcript budget.
Trust UI uses compact projection, suppresses duplicate EvidenceLine rows, and preserves key PTY trust/permission/long-output states in focused real TUI tests.
verificationCommands: bun test src/dsxu/engine/__tests__/real-tui-harness-v1.test.ts -t "keeps long-content TUI output pinned"
stages.slowSuiteBoundary: The full real-tui-harness file is slow and was not counted as a single full-suite PASS in this focused stage.

stages.summary: Evidence dashboard reads V4 consolidation status; six-stage final tests passed 20/20; clean export artifact was created with secret scan PASS; fresh install/help/doctor/provider smoke passed 8/8. P8 is done for V4 engineering/release-gate consolidation, while public benchmark or 90/95 comparison claims remain outside this gate until paired raw comparable evidence exists.
remainingPublicClaimInputs: collect 30-case public comparable paired raw evidence before any public 90/95 or external benchmark comparison claim
bind public README charts to source/test/live/raw/cost/cache evidence only
keep scoreFloor at the dashboard-computed value until comparable benchmark evidence changes it
